plugins.name: paideia
plugins.description: Exam-prep workspace for math/physics courses — 14 commands + 5 skills. Every course PDF routes through a parallel vision pipeline (faithful LaTeX, no pdfplumber word-salad). Hand-writing OCR is selectable per course: Claude native vision (default), local Qwen3-VL via Ollama, or Tesseract. Ships a per-course statusline (paideia · COURSE · D-N · phase · Pk ↑) auto-wired by init-course.
